log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Tiefling — Bardic Musician HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 30 damage. Tiefling — Bardic Musician HP: 17/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 44 damage. Tiefling — Bardic Musician HP: -27/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Tiefling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
